tweets.full_text:
Goldman Sachs Reiterates Buy Rating on $HOOD, PT $94

Analyst comments: "On 5/27, HOOD announced agentic trading and credit card offerings, which will enable AI agents to trade and make credit card payments on behalf of HOOD customers. The company also noted that it plans to enhance its customer-facing AI offerings further going forward. While agentic trading is in beta and will only support equities at first, HOOD plans to add agentic trading for other products over time. The agentic card offering only supports the HOOD Gold Card, but management plans to offer support for the HOOD Platinum Card once launched later in 2026. Finally, HOOD indicated that it plans to roll out additional AI-powered products for investors.

In our view, this is an early effort at embedding agents into key components of financial services, specifically retail brokerage and consumer finance/banking. It remains challenging to assess exactly the TAM and success of these new HOOD products, given agentic banking and brokerage products do not exist today. However, we believe that this announcement could drive additional investor concern around disruption in financial services, specifically in brokerage and banking, which has continued to mount over the course of 2026 so far. That being said, consumer behavior typically takes time to evolve, and competitors are likely to follow suit on agentic offerings if there is client demand for the product."

Analyst: James Yaro

tweets.full_text:
If someone was the first to release a fake AI-generated video, had their watermark and name already embedded on it, and circulated it publicly at 7:33 AM before it spread elsewhere, then authorities have every reason to immediately invite and question that individual.  

He may possess critical information about:  
• who created the manipulated content,  
• where it originated from,  
• who coordinated its release, and  
• whether there was an intentional attempt to mislead the public or cause unrest.  

Digital misinformation is a serious issue. The first distributor of such content is often a key link in tracing the source and determining whether any laws were violated. @OfficialDSSNG get to work now.

user.name: Chris Pavlovski 🏴‍☠️
user.description: I'm the CEO of Rumble (NASDAQ | $RUM). I ❤ everything free speech, space and decentralized.

tweets.full_text:
Today we’re announcing the launch of @Trajectorylabs, where we’re building the platform for continual learning.

The research question motivating us is simple: can AI systems improve in response to real-world experience?

Today’s agents are episodic: they complete a task, receive feedback, and reset. In doing so, they miss valuable learning signals: retries, edits, user interventions, etc. By closing the loop between interaction data and model improvement, we believe that agents can continuously improve.

But honestly what excites me most about Trajectory is working with such talented people. Our team has already trained models that beat SOTA on customer evals, models that are operating in production today.

AI research has long aspired toward continual learning. In our work thus far, we’re already seeing early signs of this being a practical reality.

user.name: Michael Elabd
user.description:
Co-founder @TrajectoryLabs 
Ex-Research @DeepMind, @Google, @Stanford

quoted_status.full_text:
Today, @MichaelElabd, @QuantumArjun, and I are excited to announce Trajectory.

We are a research lab and product company building the platform for Continual Learning. 

Our platform unlocks the signal already sitting in product usage, so companies can continuously post-train large-scale agentic models that outperform the frontier. @trajectorylabs

We’ve raised $15M from @Conviction, @BessemerVP, @radicalvcfund, @jeffdean, @drfeifei and more.

We’re partnering with some of the best AI-native companies: @ClayRunHQ @Harvey, @DecagonAI, @mercor_ai, @RogoAI to power their agentic systems, some of which we are already in production with.

We’ve brought together a world class research team from DeepMind, OpenAI, Apple, Meta Superintelligence, Amazon AGI, Scale AI, and an elite product team from Stripe and Figma. 

AI will never again start on day one. Every correction, every retry, every edit will make products smarter. This is Continual Learning.

tweets.full_text:
本日は支援先のAI研修成果報告会に参加してきました。
参加者の発表を見て確信したことは、AI研修の費用対効果を決めるのは、講師でも教材でもなく、どこまで自社業務に合わせて設計されているか。
汎用的な研修は、受講した直後の理解度は高くても、明日から使う段階で止まる。
一方、自社の業務・ツール・KPIに合わせて組まれた研修は、 受講中から実務での適用が始まり、研修終了時点で既に成果が出始める。あまりにも成長度合がすごく多くの方に見ていただきたかったほど。
研修は学びの場ではなく、成果を出すためのキックオフとして設計するべき時代。

tweets.full_text:
教皇レオ14世が「AIは喜びも苦しみも感じない」と明言した回勅の発表式典に、Anthropic共同創業者のクリス・オラー氏が招かれた。

オラー氏は「モデル内部に喜び・悲しみを反映する状態が見つかる」と述べた。

ただしAnthropic自身の論文は、同種のパターンを「感情を感じていることを示すものではない」と記載している。

論文では「統計的パターン」と書いたものを、バチカンでは「神秘」と呼んだ。
https://t.co/k3U4f2fPHV
